com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client

Interface IAgentAdminConnectorFactory

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AgentAdminConnectorFactory

    public interface IAgentAdminConnectorFactory
    Interface of the factory for creating objects that are used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise administration server

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IAgentAdminConnector createConnector(long connectTimeout)
      Creates an object that is used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise 8 administration server
      IAgentAdminConnector createConnector(Timer timer, Executor executor, long connectTimeout)
      Creates an object that is used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise 8 administration server

    • Method Detail

      • createConnector

        IAgentAdminConnector createConnector(long connectTimeout)
        Creates an object that is used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise 8 administration server
        Parameters:
        connectTimeout - connection timeout (in milliseconds)
        Returns:
        an instance of the object that is used for establishing connections with the administration server
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • createConnector

        IAgentAdminConnector createConnector(Timer timer,
                                     Executor executor,
                                     long connectTimeout)
        Creates an object that is used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise 8 administration server
        Parameters:
        timer - timer
        executor - executor
        connectTimeout - connection timeout (in milliseconds)
        Returns:
        an instance of the object that is used for establishing connections with the administration server
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.
